source: BEP Research estimates — Token Cost Decomposition
cadence: Static framework estimate. Reviewed per major hardware generation (Blackwell, Rubin, Rubin LPX) — not a quarterly refresh.
insight: Memory's share of token cost increases from 28% (Blackwell) to 35% (VR+LPX) as SRAM bandwidth becomes the critical resource for decode. This validates the Memory Wars thesis.
